# CredentialSession.Event.presentmentIntentAssertionTimeout

**Case**

The session’s presentment intent assertion timed out.

## Declaration

```swift
case presentmentIntentAssertionTimeout
```

## Discussion

A [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/PresentmentIntentAssertion] granted by a credential session lasts for 60 seconds. If it expires, your app needs to request a new one with [doc://SecureElementCredential/documentation/SecureElementCredential/CredentialSession/acquirePresentmentAssertion()].

## Timeout events

- **CredentialSession.Event.cardEmulationTimeout**: The session’s card emulation timer expired.
